name: Gloomhaven: Jaws of the Lion
description: Gloomhaven: Jaws of the Lion is the standalone, friendlier-to-newcomers entry-point into Isaac Childres' epic dungeon-crawl franchise — four pre-painted mercenary characters, a 25-scenario campaign book that doubles as the map, and a leaner ramp-up than the gargantuan original. Cooperative tactical combat with a card-management twist. Months of campaign in a much smaller box.
